name: Tc001 Verify the sign up functionality of the rtb when user is not registered it should go to onboarding

steps.name: Given  user is in the rtb landing page
When  user clicks in get started button
Then  user should able to see enter your email page
When  user enters the new user email and clicks on the continue button
Then  user should able to see otp page
When  user enters the otp and clicks on the verity otp button
Then  user should able to see the onboarding form
